codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the original blocking failure: Curve quote generation no longer fails when token decimals lookup errors. In `src/curve.ts`, decimals lookup is now fault-tolerant and wei fields fall back to empty strings; tests were added to cover both failure and normal paths. I reviewed both the failed feature diffs (including prior-reviewed `wei-and-address-display` changes and related server-side diff) and the fix commit diff, and the prior failure condition is addressed.

summary: Pass. The fix commit (`e9df0ce`) adequately addresses the prior blocking issue from `wei-and-address-display` by preventing decimals lookup failures from crashing `findCurveQuote`, while preserving normal wei computation behavior with explicit test coverage for both paths.
